## Summary

- Describe the change.

## Validation

- [ ] Relevant tests, vet, and build passed
- [ ] `make context-verify` passed
- [ ] Mapped knowledge notes were updated when behavior changed

For an internal refactor with no contract or production-behavior change, add
`Context-Reviewed:` and `Context-Reason:` as top-level PR body lines. The reason
must explain the review in at least 20 characters.
